message:
feat(tui): implement search in Main mode with '/' key

The '/' key now activates incremental search in Main (issues list) mode,
matching the behaviour already available in Board, History, Graph, and
Insights modes. The search filters by id, title, status, type, and
labels. n/N cycles through matches, Enter confirms, Escape cancels and
clears the query. Match count and position are shown in the list header.

Closes #3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
